title: Death in the Garden
writer: Luis Alcoriza, Luis Buñuel, Raymond Queneau
actors: Simone Signoret, Georges Marchal, Charles Vanel
plot: Adventurer Shark comes to a small village near a diamond-miners' camp, and local police arrest him, accusing him of having committed a bank robbery in a neighboring town. The police also confiscate the diamond mine for the state, ...
